languages.original_text: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And the source of this tranquillity, we must assume, is not anything sacred."

languages.text: "Идира права. Имматериум здесь... словно приглушен. И, надо полагать, источник этого внезапного безмолвия отнюдь не свят".
"Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And we can only assume that the cause of this sudden silence is far from sacred."
languages.original_text: "Идира права. Имматериум здесь... словно приглушен. И, надо полагать, источник этого внезапного безмолвия отнюдь не свят".

traits.locale_text: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And the source of this tranquillity, we must assume, is not anything sacred."
"Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And the source of this tranquillity, we must assume, is not anything sacred."
"Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And the source of this tranquillity, we must assume, is not anything sacred."
"Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And we can only assume that the cause of this sudden silence is far from sacred."

languages.text: 「イディラは正しい。この物質界の...静けさは、聖なるものによるものではないと推測される」
languages.original_text: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And the source of this tranquillity, we must assume, is not anything sacred."

traits.locale_text: 「イディラは正しい。この物質界の...静けさは、聖なるものによるものではないと推測される。」

languages.text: « Idira a raison. L'Immaterium est... assourdi par ici, et nous devons partir du principe que la source de cette tranquillité n'a rien de sacré. »
languages.original_text: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And the source of this tranquillity, we must assume, is not anything sacred."

traits.locale_text: « Idira a raison. L'Immaterium est... assourdi par ici, et nous devons partir du principe que la source de cette tranquillité n'a rien de sacré. »

languages.text: "Idira hat recht. Das Immaterium ... ist stumm hier. Und der Ursprung dieser Ruhe, davon müssen wir ausgehen, ist nichts Heiliges."
languages.original_text: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And the source of this tranquillity, we must assume, is not anything sacred."

traits.locale_text: "Idira hat recht. Das Immaterium ... ist stumm hier. Und der Ursprung dieser Ruhe, davon müssen wir ausgehen, ist nichts Heiliges."

languages.text: "İdira haklı. Tindiyar... Suskunlaştırılmış. Bu sükûnetin kaynağının kutsal bir şey olmadığını varsaymalıyız."
languages.original_text: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And the source of this tranquillity, we must assume, is not anything sacred."

traits.locale_text: "İdira haklı. Tindiyar... Suskunlaştırılmış. Bu sükûnetin kaynağının kutsal bir şey olmadığını varsaymalıyız."

languages.text: «Idira tiene razón. Aquí el inmaterio está... enmudecido. Y no cabe sino asumir que el origen de esta tranquilidad es de todo menos sagrado».
languages.original_text: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And the source of this tranquillity, we must assume, is not anything sacred."

traits.locale_text: «Idira tiene razón. Aquí el inmaterio está... enmudecido. Y no cabe sino asumir que el origen de esta tranquilidad es de todo menos sagrado».

languages.text: “伊迪拉说得对。这里的亚空间……被静默了。我们只能假设，这宁静的源头并非任何神圣之物。”
languages.original_text: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And the source of this tranquillity, we must assume, is not anything sacred."

traits.locale_text: “伊迪拉说得对。这里的亚空间……被静默了。我们只能假设，这宁静的源头并非任何神圣之物。”
